name: Lime Mousse Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 angel cake, or any other leftover white cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a spring form pan with parchment paper.
2. Place a very thin layer of the angel cake (or other leftover white cake) in the pan.
3. Sprinkle with the rum or liqueur. Chill.
4. Dissolve the gelatin in the water.
5. Whip the egg yolks with half the sugar until lemon-colored. Stir in the gelatin and lime juice mixture, whipping to combine.
6. Chill while preparing the cream.
7. Whip cream separately, then add the remaining sugar to make chantilly. Stir into the lime gelatin mixture. Chill for 1 hour.
8. Whip egg whites until they form soft peaks. Slowly fold them into the lime mixture.
9. Pour the mousse into the prepared pan and freeze.
10. Remove the pie from the freezer and let it sit in the refrigerator for 6 hours before serving, or allow to stand at room temperature (in summer) for 1 hour before serving.
From Miriam in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
